prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约11623→11425→11199→9660→9455，整体呈持续前移趋势（竞争加剧），近4年累计前移约2168名；2025年基准位次约9455名，较2024年仅前移205名，前移幅度明显收窄；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为16人，2023–2025年缩减至14人，2026年计划仍为14人，与2025年持平，未进一步缩招或扩招，计划稳定对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，综合类；软科中国大学排名近年约第95–101名，2026年最新排名第101名，排名略有下滑但仍处于全国百强区间；2023年高考周期内曾出现师德师风类偏负面舆情（教师要求女生穿超短裙表演），对学校形象有一定影响；抖音综合热度排名第84位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；2021–2025年均无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录安徽大学条目，优势学科信息缺失。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业集中于数据科学与大数据技术、集成电路设计与集成系统、电气工程及其自动化、电子科学与技术、网络空间安全等工科方向，对应计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业大类，2026年专业热度分析显示上述方向均为“高热推荐”或“推荐”，社会报考热度持续偏高；重庆市物理类考生从2021年约9.9万增至2025年约13.9万，增幅约41%，2026年总考生约20.9万，按近年物理类占比约65%估算，物理类考生约13.6万，较2025年略有下降；省控线方面，重庆物理类本科批2021–2025年分别为446→411→406→427→425分，整体波动不大；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，在重庆市招生占比极小（近年约0.02–0.03），属跨省招生，非本地生源主场，地域偏好对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移但2024→2025年前移幅度收窄、2026年招生计划持平、物理类考生总数略降、热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高、学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年竞争态势与2025年基本相当但略有加剧；在2025年基准9455名基础上小幅前移，预测最低位次约9425名，区间8925–9925名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11623 → 11425 → 11199 → 9660 → 9455, showing a continuous upward trend (increasing competition), with a cumulative upward shift of about 2168 places over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9455, only 205 places higher than 2024, indicating a significant narrowing of the upward shift; the enrollment plan for Anhui University in Chongqing Physics Category was 16 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 14 students in 2023–2025, and remains at 14 students for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no further reduction or expansion, and the stable plan has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, comprehensive type; in recent years, the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 95–101, with the latest 2026 ranking at 101, showing a slight decline but still within the national top 100 range; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics (a teacher required female students to wear miniskirts for a performance), which had some impact on the university's image; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no significant signs of increased application interest; there were no records of enrollment gaps from 2021 to 2025; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Anhui University entries, and information on advantageous disciplines is missing.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors are concentrated in engineering directions such as Data Science and Big Data Technology, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Science and Technology, and Cyberspace Security, corresponding to major categories like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation; the 2026 major popularity analysis shows these directions are all 'highly recommended' or 'recommended', with social application heat remaining high; the number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing increased from about 99,000 in 2021 to about 139,000 in 2025, an increase of about 41%, and the total number of examinees in 2026 is about 209,000, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 136,000 based on the recent proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease from 2025; regarding the provincial control line, the Chongqing Physics Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 was 446 → 411 → 406 → 427 → 425 points, with overall small fluctuations; Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, and its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is very small (about 0.02–0.03% in recent years), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, not a local home ground, so regional preference has a limited impact on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward shift in historical rankings but the narrowing of the upward shift from 2024 to 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees, the persistently high social heat for popular engineering majors, and the stable university reputation, it is expected that the competitive situation in 2026 will be roughly similar to 2025 but slightly intensified; based on the 2025 baseline of 9455, a small upward shift is predicted, with the minimum ranking estimated at about 9425, and a range of 8925–9925.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8925–9925, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology or Electronic Science and Technology.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 3908 → 3421 → 5058 → 4507 → 4503; in 2023, it dropped sharply to 5058, but stabilized around 4500 in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4503; the enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 11 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026 it is reduced to 8 students, a decrease of about 27.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and theoretically will intensify competition and push the ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, comprehensive type; its Soft Science ranking in recent years is approximately 95–101, with the latest ranking in 2026 being 101; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was some negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics and style; its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average'; there were no records of enrollment gaps from 2021 to 2025; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Anhui University entries, and information on advantageous disciplines is missing.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors offered in History Category are Law, Finance, Journalism and Communication, and Spanish. Analysis of major popularity in 2026 shows: Law is 'divergent observation' (both recommended and discouraged), Finance/Economics is 'divergent observation', Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged', and Foreign Languages is 'general observation'; overall, the social popularity of liberal arts majors is neutral to slightly cold, especially Journalism and Communication being clearly discouraged may suppress application willingness; the number of History Category examinees in Chongqing decreased from about 83,000 in 2021 to about 73,000 in 2025, a decrease of about 11%, and in 2026, estimated at about 73,000 based on a History Category proportion of about 35%, roughly the same as 2025; regarding the provincial control line, the Chongqing History Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 was 456 → 415 → 407 → 428 → 438 points, with a slight recovery in recent years; Anhui University recruits across provinces in Chongqing, with a very small enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the intensified competition due to the significant reduction in enrollment in History Category in 2026 (from 11 to 8 students), the overall neutral to slightly cold social popularity of liberal arts majors (Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged), and the basically stable total number of History Category examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is about 3846, with a range of 3346–4346.
